title: Jim Coffey
compiled_truth: Jim Coffey is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-06-05), Jim Coffey sent 28 and received 227 emails, totalling 255 interactions. Top correspondents: [Brian Redmond](people/brian-redmond) (13), [A  Martin](people/a-martin) (10), [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (9), [David Baumbach](people/david-baumbach) (8), [Jim Schwieger](people/jim-schwieger) (7).
